title: Getting Started on the Path to National Science Foundation Funding — D-RED Seminar Slides (PRISSEM)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-02-16 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Getting Started on the Path to National Science Foundation Funding', co-presented by Claudia Rankins, PhD and Falcon Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM Academic Services, LLC). Earliest PRISSEM-led NSF seminar in the D-RED archive.
